findings.message: mod.ts is 443 lines; convention cap is 200 — split into sub-entrypoints
mod.ts has 346 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
exported function 'publishJobToStream' uses non-standard prefix 'publish' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'resetWorker' uses non-standard prefix 'reset' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
type 'QueueTriggerConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
exported function 'resetScheduler' uses non-standard prefix 'reset' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
README missing 12/12 mandated sections (Overview, Quickstart, Mental model, API, Recipes, Configuration, Testing, Observability, Architecture, Stability, Compatibility, License)
no tests/ directory and no inline *_test.ts files — every package needs meaningful tests
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
